subcodes.first_line: O scion of that illustrious personage, and O descendant of that peerlessly great one! … The Blessed Beauty — may my life be a sacrifice for His loved ones
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل آن شخص جلیل و حفید آن بزرگوار فرید نامه ات رسید و ناله زارت تاثیر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
